stories.title: Wembanyama 41/16 — Season High, Fastest Double-Double in NBA History

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
FORTY-ONE points. 16 rebounds. The fastest double-double in NBA history.

Wembanyama just put on a show vs. the Bulls last night — and the MVP race is his to lose.

#HoopHeroes #Wembanyama #Spurs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Wemby's March has been HISTORIC.

Season-high 41 pts. No. 1 on the Kia MVP Ladder. Spurs on a 9-game win streak at 56-18.

At 22 years old, he's doing things we've never seen.

#HoopHeroes #Wembanyama #NBA

article.headline: Wembanyama Drops Season-High 41 Points, Reportedly Sets Fastest Double-Double Record in NBA History

stories.title: LeBron Ties Kareem's All-Time Career Wins Record at 1,228

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
LeBron James — career win No. 1,228.

He just tied Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most wins by any player in NBA history. Triple-double in the process (21/10/12).

Some careers just never end. 🐐

#HoopHeroes #LeBron #Lakers

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
LeBron assisted on Bronny's three-pointer last night — and some are calling it the first father-son assist in NBA history.

1,228 career wins. A record tied. A moment made for the history books.

#HoopHeroes #Lakers #NBA

article.headline: LeBron James Ties Kareem Abdul-Jabbar's All-Time Career Wins Record at 1,228

stories.title: Edwards Returns — Wolves Rout Mavs 124-94, Dosunmu Triple-Double

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Anthony Edwards is BACK.

17 pts off the bench in his first game back. The Wolves blew out Dallas 124-94. Randle dropped 24. Gobert 14/10.

ANT returning for All-NBA eligibility. The push is on.

#HoopHeroes #Timberwolves #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Ayo Dosunmu with a 16/15/12 triple-double off the bench. First since joining Minnesota at the deadline.

Nobody talks about him — but the Wolves are 46-29 and rolling in 5th West.

#HoopHeroes #Timberwolves #NBA

article.headline: Edwards Returns, Dosunmu Triples: Wolves Rout Mavs 124-94 in Statement Win

stories.title: Knicks Clinch Playoff Spot After 76ers Fall to Heat 119-109

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The New York Knicks are IN. 🏆

NYK clinched a 2026 playoff berth after Miami beat Philly 119-109. Knicks are 48-27 without even playing last night.

East is locking in. #HoopHeroes #Knicks #NBA

stories.title: Curry Still Out — 25+ Games, Warriors Teetering at No. 10 West

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Steph Curry has now missed 25+ straight games — and there's still no timetable.

Warriors are 35-38 and locked into the Play-In. Curry himself said: "It's kind of unpredictable how it'll heal."

#HoopHeroes #Warriors #NBA

article.headline: Curry Still Sidelined 25-Plus Games: Warriors' Play-In Future Hangs in the Balance

stories.title: MVP Race — Wemby No. 1, SGA No. 2, Jokic Averaging a Triple-Double

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
MVP Ladder check with 10 games left:

No. 1 Wembanyama (24.2/11.3/3.1 BPG)
No. 2 SGA
No. 3 Jokic (28/12.6/10.6 — full triple-double averages)
No. 4 Luka — now suspended

It's wide open. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #NBA #MVP

stories.title: Playoff Picture — Lakers Can Clinch Tonight, Luka Suspended

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Lakers can clinch a playoff spot tonight — without Luka, who sits out for his 16th tech.

West seeds 3-8 are separated by 3 games. Every night matters from here.

Season ends April 12. #HoopHeroes #Lakers #NBA
